profile.name: Michael Talaat
profile.title: Flutter Developer & UI/UX Designer
profile.bio: Senior-minded Flutter engineer focused on product-grade mobile apps, scalable architecture, and polished motion. I build fast, maintainable iOS and Android experiences with clean state management, thoughtful UX, and production-ready delivery.

projects.name: Quick Bite
projects.description: Quick Bite is a fast and modern food ordering application designed to deliver a smooth user experience for browsing meals, placing orders, and tracking deliveries in real time. It includes a powerful admin panel that allows full control over products, orders, pricing, and analytics. Built with a focus on speed, usability, and scalability, Quick Bite provides an efficient bridge between customers and food services.
